mission_10: WITH revenue AS (SELECT customer_id, SUM(total_amount) AS revenue FROM orders WHERE status = 'completed' AND order_date >= '2025-01-01' AND order_date < '2026-01-01' GROUP BY customer_id), leaderboard AS (SELECT customer_id, revenue, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY revenue DESC) AS rnk, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY revenue DESC) AS drnk FROM revenue) SELECT customer_id, revenue, rnk, drnk FROM leaderboard ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 10;
